name: Bitch Adoption Center
description:
Adopt or Become a Pet at the Adoption Centre!

A Bitch is a Man or Woman who sold Themselves to the Bitch adoption centre to become adopted, once at the adoption centre a bitch chooses between the four different categories to be adopted as Which are Slave, Pet, Dominant and Love

Slave being an entirely Smutty story
Pet being mostly Fluff, but you can make it Smut
Dominant Being Smutty as well as Slave but you're the one in control
And Finally Love being Fluff with Possible sex

Edit: Changed a little, now it's a AnyPov Bot! Also, you can become a Bitch as a man AND adopt a Male Bitch!

Original Idea by @ThreeCents. Here Is the Original bot if you wanna check it out <3
